creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: kuriyama
Date: Mon Jul 29 14:50:30 2013
New Revision: 323890
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323890

Log:
  - Upgrade to 0.10.35.
  
  PR:		ports/179904
  Submitted by:	swills

Modified:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/distinfo
  head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/files/fluentd.in   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/Makefile	Mon Jul 29 14:49:11 2013	(r323889)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/Makefile	Mon Jul 29 14:50:30 2013	(r323890)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	fluentd
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.34
+PORTVERSION=	0.10.35
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
@@ -16,7 +16,6 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	\
 	rubygem-http_parser.rb>=0.5.1:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-http_parser.rb
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
-#RUBY_VER=	1.9	# Please set RUBY_DEFAULT_VER=1.9 in /etc/make.conf
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/fluent-cat bin/fluent-debug bin/fluent-gem bin/fluentd \
 		"@exec ${INSTALL} -d -o ${USERS} -g ${GROUPS} -m 775 /var/run/fluentd" \

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/distinfo	Mon Jul 29 14:49:11 2013	(r323889)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/distinfo	Mon Jul 29 14:50:30 2013	(r323890)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/fluentd-0.10.34.gem) = 8a5bcc6f2febf58c7a36d01fbaa4ac036150b222e5f896a92af6f967dde1c4b0
-SIZE (rubygem/fluentd-0.10.34.gem) = 62976
+SHA256 (rubygem/fluentd-0.10.35.gem) = 97fc77adb60a7f24de95d26aaf01cb74fcfce560297f26e0c7f5a1d1d0038209
+SIZE (rubygem/fluentd-0.10.35.gem) = 63488

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/files/fluentd.in
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/files/fluentd.in	Mon Jul 29 14:49:11 2013	(r323889)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-fluentd/files/fluentd.in	Mon Jul 29 14:50:30 2013	(r323890)
@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@
 # fluentd_config (path):	Set to %%PREFIX%%/etc/fluentd/fluent.conf
 # 		  		by default.
 # fluentd_db_dir (path):	Set DB dir (default: "/var/db/fluentd")
+# fluentd_flags (str):          Set to "" by default.
 
 . /etc/rc.subr
 
@@ -28,11 +29,13 @@ load_rc_config $name
 : ${fluentd_dir="%%PREFIX%%/etc/fluentd"}
 : ${fluentd_user="%%USER%%"}
 : ${fluentd_group="%%GROUP%%"}
+: ${fluentd_flags:=""}
 
 init_cmd="init_fluentd_dir"
 
 command=%%PREFIX%%/bin/${name}
 pidfile=/var/run/${name}/${name}.pid
+command_interpreter=%%RUBY%%
 
 command_args="-d $pidfile -c $fluentd_config"
